title: XBR Crops 3D
description: This pack is made for the pack VanillaXBR by @misterk7_-  it makes the crops 3D and is inspired by Crops 3D by NinthWorld on curseforge
body: This pack was made to add 3D Crops to VanillaXBR by misterk7_- all credit for the block models goes to NinthWorld on Curseforge who made 3D Crops for the more pixel styled vanilla
